legend.automated: Verified in the authoring DOM by an it() block (degrades gracefully when the flag-gated widget is not offered).
legend.deferred: Documented as it.skip() — requires login/activity bootstrap, copy/delete or persistence lifecycle, Preview/Reader/CLP/Publish/saLTIre, cross-browser, Figma comparison, or math/format RENDER flows.
